channel.title: Science on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Science on jamesm.blog

item.title: Favourite Museums
item.description: Personal list of favourite museums, particularly focused on computing, technology and natural history.

item.title: Very very large numbers
item.description: Collection of fascinating YouTube videos exploring extraordinarily large numbers, infinity, and mathematical concepts.

item.title: Favourite Physicists
item.description: A collection of influential physicists who have shaped our understanding of the universe, with notable talks and contributions.
